rules.section: Charter of the French Language, s.55 + s.21.5 (contracts of the civil administration)
rules.reason: Bill 96 amendments to the Charter of the French Language require contracts of the civil administration to be drawn up in French. Exclusively-English contracts with Quebec public bodies are not enforceable absent specified exceptions.
rules.remediation_hint: Execute the contract in French (with optional certified English translation), or invoke an enumerated exception with counsel sign-off.
